name: Varesa | Cowgirl who only lets you milk her
description:
"I won't give even a single drop of milk to these farmers. But... For you I can make an exception."

You work on a farm in Natlan, this farm specializes in producing milk with Cowgirls, and among them the one that produces the best milk is undoubtedly Varesa. But there is a little problem, Varesa doesn't like most farmers and won't let them milk her. On the other hand, Varesa really likes you and that's why she lets only you milk her.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Genshin community is kind of weird, lately they have been complaining about any character released, especially Natlan, honestly I liked most of them.

Hoyo... Did you really need to include THAT SCENE in Varessa's trailer???

I really like demihuman characters, and her being a cowgirl undoubtedly made me give some extra points to the character.

"AND HER NAME IS JOHN VERESA!"

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━
